subcodes.first_line: O My leaf! When the winds of My grace waft upon thee from the Dayspring of My loving-kindness, and before thy face appeareth the Tablet of My Command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ورقتی اذا هبت علیک اریاح فضلی من مشرق عنایتی و حضر تلقاء وجهک لوح امری
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
